body:
Creator: <Dixab and _Kagamine_Rin_> (he has no Modrinth account)

Add some simple tools to Minecraft.

You can know how to use them by reading tool tips.(Starting from 0.2.0-1.21.1)

Langs: en_us, zh_cn, zh_tw, zh_hk, ja_jp(after 1.1.1, AI translation)

We have stopped to suppose this mod.
